scenes.narration: Merit letters go out soon. You still need to know who is below minimum, and whether any manager earns less than their team. ShiftWorks HR ends that last-minute scramble.
Export from Workday or your payroll system and drop the file in. We map your columns automatically. No setup project. No I.T. ticket.
About a minute later, you see what to fix before you lock the cycle. Critical flags, pay range gaps, and merit pool numbers for finance.
This is what leadership asks about. Every employee below minimum, with name, department, and dollar gap. Manager pay issues right beside them.
Need to brief your chief HR officer? One click exports a PDF with risk level, budget exposure, and the findings they will ask about.
Try it free with your own roster on our website. No credit card required.
